tree.name: John Collins
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: LAC sent Norman Powell to MIA, cash and a 2027 2nd round pick (LAC own) to UTA; MIA sent Kyle Anderson and Kevin Love to UTA; UTA sent John Collins to LAC

assetsGivenUp.name: Norman Powell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded from Trail Blazers with Robert Covington for Eric Bledsoe, Keon Johnson, Justise Winslow, and a 2025 2nd round pick (DET own, became Bogoljub Markovic)
assetsGivenUp.note: Scoring guard

assetsGivenUp.name: Eric Bledsoe
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded from Grizzlies for Patrick Beverley, Daniel Oturu, and Rajon Rondo
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran guard

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Oturu
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded from Timberwolves for Mathias Lessort and a 2023 2nd round pick (DET own, became James Nnaji)
assetsGivenUp.note: Young center

assetsGivenUp.name: Mathias Lessort
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from 76ers in 4-team Jimmy Butler sign-and-trade (LAC sent cash to MIA; received Lessort from PHI and Harkless from POR)
assetsGivenUp.note: International big man

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Miami in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Rajon Rondo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded from Hawks for Lou Williams, a 2023 2nd round pick (POR own, became Julian Phillips) and a 2027 2nd round pick (LAC own)

assetsGivenUp.name: Lou Williams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Rockets in Chris Paul trade (LAC sent Chris Paul to HOU for Beverley, Dekker, Harrell, Hilliard, Liggins, Lou Williams, Wiltjer, cash, and a 2018 1st)
assetsGivenUp.note: Three-time Sixth Man of the Year

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded from New Orleans Hornets for Eric Gordon, Chris Kaman, Al-Farouq Aminu, a 2012 1st round pick (became Austin Rivers), and a 2015 2nd round pick
